title: A New Office Creation
article_text: A journalist wrote a report about a massive change in our office. The company decided to install a new computer system. A reporter highlighted the need for a consistent update of the software. The upper manager wanted to calculate the cost of this creation. The new system would occupy less space and preserve our old files. A sudden illness caused a split in the team's work schedule. The office had sufficient luck to finish the project on time. The mouse and keyboard were easy to swing into position. The mathematics teacher helped outline the plan for the new system. An advertisement for the new office showed a beautiful shirt with the company logo.

image_prompts: A journalist writing a report at a desk, with a large sign saying 'MASSIVE CHANGE' on the wall.
A technician installing a new computer system in an office, with boxes labeled 'NEW SYSTEM'.
A reporter pointing at a calendar with 'CONSISTENT UPDATE' written on it, software boxes nearby.
An upper manager using a calculator to count money, with a blueprint labeled 'CREATION'.
A new computer system on a small desk, with old files preserved in a cabinet next to it.
A team member lying sick on a couch, with a broken clock showing a split in the schedule.
An office worker holding a lucky charm, with a project chart showing 'FINISHED ON TIME'.
A person swinging a computer mouse and keyboard into place on a desk.
A mathematics teacher drawing a plan on a whiteboard with an outline of a system.
An advertisement poster showing a beautiful shirt with a company logo, in a modern office.
